title: astragalus harazensis
intro: Astragalus harazensis, a perennial herb belonging to the legume family, is native to Iran and is also known as Haraz milkvetch. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus harazensis include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of fatigue and fever. Astragalus harazensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
